name: ModifyPythonPartUtil
summary: implementation of the utility class for the PythonPart modification

methods.name: modify_element_property
methods.signature: modify_element_property(page: int, name: str, value: Any)
methods.summary: Handles the modify element property event. This event is triggered with each modification of the element property done in the property palette or by using a handle.
methods.remarks: Handles the modify element property event. This event is triggered with each modification of the element property done in the property palette or by using a handle.

params.name: value
params.doc: New value of the modified property.

methods.name: on_cancel_function
methods.summary: Handles the cancel function event This event is triggered when the ESC button is hit during the runtime of the PythonPart.
methods.remarks: Handles the cancel function event This event is triggered when the ESC button is hit during the runtime of the PythonPart.

returns.doc: True when the PythonPart framework should terminate the PythonPart, False otherwise.

methods.name: on_control_event
methods.summary: Handles the on control event. Called when an event is triggered by a palette control (ex. button).
methods.remarks: Handles the on control event. Called when an event is triggered by a palette control (ex. button).

params.name: event_id
params.doc: event id of the clicked button control

methods.name: on_mouse_leave
methods.summary: Handles the mouse leave event. This event is triggered, when the mouse leaves the viewport.
methods.remarks: Handles the mouse leave event. This event is triggered, when the mouse leaves the viewport.

methods.name: on_preview_draw
methods.summary: Handles the preview draw event. This event is triggered, when an input in the dialog line is done (e.g. input of a coordinate).
methods.remarks: Handles the preview draw event. This event is triggered, when an input in the dialog line is done (e.g. input of a coordinate).

methods.name: on_value_input_control_enter
methods.summary: Handles the value input control enter event. This event is triggered, when enter key is hit during the input inside the input control located in the dialog line.
methods.remarks: Handles the value input control enter event. This event is triggered, when enter key is hit during the input inside the input control located in the dialog line.

methods.name: process_mouse_msg
methods.signature: process_mouse_msg(mouse_msg: int, pnt: Point2D, msg_info: Any) -> bool
methods.summary: Handles the process mouse message event. This event is triggered with each message sent by the mouse, which can be a mouse move, mouse click, zoom out, etc. The message is sent only during mouse actions inside a viewport.
methods.remarks: Handles the process mouse message event. This event is triggered with each message sent by the mouse, which can be a mouse move, mouse click, zoom out, etc. The message is sent only during mouse actions inside a viewport.

params.name: pnt
params.doc: The input point in view coordinates. The origin is the mid point of the viewport

params.name: coord_input
params.doc: API object for the coordinate input, element selection, ... in the Allplan view
